note: Added TestGitGuardPrechecks_LooseRefLock_LinkedWorktree in internal/app/git_guard_test.go (after line 750). The test creates a linked worktree via `git worktree add`, resolves the common dir from `--git-common-dir` with the same filepath.Join(wtDir, commonDir) fallback as the implementation, places a stale wt-branch.lock file under refs/heads/ in the common dir, and asserts gitGuardPrechecks returns executor_git_guard_inconclusive. This exercises the WalkDir(commonDir, refs/) path that the previous tests did not cover in a linked-worktree context.
